title: Create VR
description: a ready to play VR create mod pack. simple and easy to use.
body:
a easy to play create VR mod pack with quality of life mods!
run in minecraft 1.19.2 with fabric and quilt.
dont forgot to alow more ram to your minecraft!

links of cursedforge Mods:
effective: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/effective
Illumination:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/illuminations
Falling Leaves https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-fabric
